items.title: Pallapatla mourns its illustrious daughter S. Janaki
items.summary: Residents recall the legendary singer’s childhood in the village as tributes pour in, with Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu saying her timeless voice touched generations
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: U.S. Citizen Tests Positive for Ebola in Democratic Republic of Congo
items.summary: The American, who works for the humanitarian organization Samaritan’s Purse, is the second to be infected in an outbreak that continues to spread.
